title: The Treasure
content:
When they see my songs
They will sigh and say,
"Poor soul, wistful soul,
Lonely night and day."

They will never know
All your love for me
Surer than the spring,
Stronger than the sea;

Hidden out of sight
Like a miser's gold
In forsaken fields
Where the wind is cold.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "The Treasure"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
